title: Korean-Style Shrimp Stir-Fry
description: A quick and flavorful stir-fry made with succulent shrimp and a variety of spices.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the shrimp and cook until pink and cooked through, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Remove the shrimp from the skillet and set aside.
In the same skillet, add the remaining 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil.
Add the gochujang, soy sauce, ginger, and garlic to the skillet and stir-fry for 1 minute.
Return the shrimp to the skillet and stir-fry for another minute.
Serve the shrimp hot, garnished with sesame oil and your choice of additional toppings.
Optional: serve with steamed rice or noodles for a filling meal.
